allow: Bash(cd /Users/boraesen/Desktop/app-factory && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo "OK - typecheck passes")

Bash(cd "/Users/boraesen/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Desktop/etsy-scraper" && .venv/bin/python -c "
from db import init_db, get_session, Product
init_db\(\)
s = get_session\(\)
products = s.query\(Product\).all\(\)
status_counts = {}
for p in products:
    st = p.publish_status or 'pending'
    status_counts[st] = status_counts.get\(st, 0\) + 1
total = len\(products\)
with_images = sum\(1 for p in products if p.images and len\(p.images\) > 0\)
with_local = sum\(1 for p in products if p.local_images and len\(p.local_images\) > 0\)
with_rating = sum\(1 for p in products if p.rating\)
bs = sum\(1 for p in products if p.is_bestseller\)
pn = sum\(1 for p in products if p.is_popular_now\)
print\(f'Total products: {total}'\)
print\(f'Bestsellers: {bs} | Popular Now: {pn}'\)
print\(f'With image URLs: {with_images} | Downloaded locally: {with_local} | With rating: {with_rating}'\)
print\(f'Status: {status_counts}'\)
s.close\(\)
")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/createdb etsy_scraper 2>&1 || /usr/local/bin/createdb etsy_scraper 2>&1 || psql -c "CREATE DATABASE etsy_scraper" 2>&1)
